title: Content Creator
description:
About the Role
We are looking for a creative, detail-orientated, and self-driven Content Creator Intern to
join our team. This role is designed for students or fresh graduates who want to bridge the
gap between academic knowledge and real-world marketing. You will be responsible for
producing engaging content across multiple platforms to strengthen our brand presence
and support our marketing objectives.
Key Responsibilities
• Content Development: Assist in creating original content for social media
(LinkedIn, Instagram), blogs, and email campaigns.
• Multimedia Production: Create high-quality short-form videos (Reels/Shorts),
graphics, and written posts.
• Strategy & Planning: Help plan and execute content calendars aligned with brand
goals.
• Market Research: Conduct trend analysis and competitor studies to generate fresh
content ideas.
• Collaboration: Work with the marketing and technical teams to ensure content
accuracy and consistency.
• Optimisation: Learn to optimise content for SEO and platform algorithms.
Required Skills & Qualifications
• Education: Currently pursuing or recently graduated with a degree in Marketing,
Communications, Media, Journalism, or a related field.
• Writing Skills: Strong storytelling and visual communication abilities.
• Technical Tools: Familiarity with tools like Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or
similar.
• Platform Knowledge: Hands-on experience with social media platforms (LinkedIn,
Instagram, YouTube).
• Mindset: Ability to multitask, meet deadlines, and a strong sense of aesthetics.
What We Offer
• Practical Mentorship: Hands-on experience with real-world projects and industry
tools.
• Certificate of Completion: An official internship certificate and Letter of
Recommendation.
• Career Growth: Potential for a Full-Time Offer (PPO) based on performance.
• Creative Freedom: A dynamic environment that encourages new ideas and
experimentation.

title: Data Science Intern
description:
Data Science Trainee
Company: eNest Technologies Private Limited
Location: Mohali (Onsite)
Position Type: Data Science Intern

About eNest Technologies
eNest Technologies Private Limited is a technology-focused company delivering AI, Machine Learning, and Intelligent Automation solutions to global clients across healthcare, finance, logistics, and enterprise SaaS sectors. We specialize in building scalable ML models, predictive analytics systems, and production-ready AI workflows.

We are looking to onboard talented and motivated final-year students who are passionate about Data Science and want hands-on exposure to real-world AI systems.

Eligibility
Final Year B.Tech students (2026 passing out batch)

Branches: Computer Science Engineering (CSE), AI & ML, Data Science, Information Technology, or related fields
Strong academic foundation in Mathematics and Programming

Role Overview
The selected candidate will work closely with senior data scientists and engineers on live client projects. This role provides exposure to the complete machine learning lifecycle — from data preprocessing and modeling to validation and deployment.

Key Responsibilities
Perform data cleaning, preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis (EDA)
Assist in building and evaluating machine learning models
Work on regression, classification, and clustering problems
Implement ML algorithms using Python
Prepare reports and data visualizations
Support model testing and performance evaluation
Collaborate with development teams for integration support

Required Skills
Proficiency in Python
Understanding of Statistics, Probability, and Linear Algebra
Familiarity with Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn
Basic knowledge of SQL
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities

Preferred (Good to Have)
Exposure to Deep Learning (TensorFlow/PyTorch)
Experience with academic or personal ML projects
Familiarity with Git

What We Offer

Real-world industry exposure in AI/ML projects
Mentorship from experienced Data Science professionals
Practical experience in production-level ML systems
Opportunity for full-time employment based on performance

Application Process
Interested final-year students may share their updated resume (along with GitHub/Project links, if available) at:

📧 diptisharma@enestit.com

eNest Technologies Private Limited
Building Intelligent Systems for Tomorrow’s Enterprises

title: AI Architecture Intern
description:
About Grizon AI

At Grizon AI, we are not building another generic ChatGPT wrapper. We are building the "Sovereign Brain of India." Indian enterprises (Pharma, Law, BFSI) are locked out of the AI revolution because sending sensitive IP to US-based servers violates the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act. Grizon AI solves this. We are an Enterprise Agentic Orchestration Platform powered entirely by locally hosted, sovereign models.

We don’t do "chatbots." We build autonomous digital workforces that can plan, execute, and mathematically verify their own work without a single byte of data leaving Indian servers.

 The Internship: What to Expect

Forget fetching coffee or writing basic QA tests. As an AI Architecture Intern at Grizon AI, you will be thrown into the deep end of Multi-Agent Orchestration. You will work directly with our Lead Architects to build out the core logic of our platform.

If you are obsessed with LLMs, Agentic Workflows, and want to learn how to deploy AI in highly regulated enterprise environments, this is the best launchpad for your career.

 What You Will Do (Key Responsibilities)

Agent Development: Assist in building specialized "Worker Agents" (e.g., Legal Bots, Pharma Auditors) using frameworks like CrewAI, LangGraph, or AutoGen.

Sovereign Model Testing: Benchmark and test locally hosted open-weight models (Llama-3, DeepSeek-R1, Qwen) and Indian native models (Sarvam AI) for speed, accuracy, and hallucination rates.

Verification Pipelines: Help integrate our deterministic execution sandbox (Judge0) so our agents can write code, test it, and fix their own bugs autonomously.

RAG Implementation: Build and optimize Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases to help our agents read complex legal and medical documents securely.

 What We Are Looking For (Requirements)

Education: Currently pursuing a B.Tech/M.Tech (CS/IT/AI-ML) or recently graduated.

Core Coding: Strong, hands-on programming skills in Python. You should be comfortable writing clean, modular code.

AI Fundamentals: You know how LLMs actually work under the hood. You understand Transformers, RAG, and basic Prompt Engineering beyond just using the ChatGPT interface.

The "Show Me" Factor: A strong GitHub Profile or portfolio. We want to see projects where you built a custom AI tool, fine-tuned a model, or played with API integrations.

 Mindset: Extreme curiosity, hustle, and the ability to figure things out by reading documentation.

 Why Intern with Grizon AI?

The ultimate Learning Curve: You will learn more about production-grade AI architecture in 6 months here than in 4 years of college.

Real-World Impact: The code you write will be used to process real legal and medical data safely across India.

The PPO: This is a pre-placement pipeline. If you crush this internship, you will be offered a full-time role as an AI Architect before you even graduate.

title: Deep Learning Intern
description:
Zylectra is a deep-tech startup revolutionizing battery safety. We don’t just look for data patterns; we build physics-informed models that understand the "why" behind battery degradation. Our mission is to predict premature failures with precision and provide actionable intelligence to both manufacturers and consumers.

The Role

We are looking for a brilliant Deep Learning Intern to help refine our core predictive engine. You will work on integrating physical constraints (thermodynamics, degradation chemistry) into deep learning architectures to improve the accuracy of RUL (Remaining Useful Life) and failure forecasting.

Key Responsibilities

- Model Development: Help build and train "physics-informed" models that predict battery failure (X days/months out) with associated risk scores.
- Root Cause Analysis: Assist in developing multi-modal architectures to identify *why* a battery failed (e.g., lithium plating, thermal runaway) and attribute fault.
- Data Pipeline: Pre-process high-frequency time-series data from Battery Management Systems (BMS).
- Optimization: Experiment with Loss Function engineering to incorporate physical laws into the training process.

Requirements

- Technical Stack: Strong proficiency in Python and frameworks like PyTorch or TensorFlow.
- Deep Learning: Solid understanding of CNNs, LSTMs, Transformers or core deep learning fundamentals for time-series data.
- The "Plus" Factor (not mandatory): Familiarity with PINNs (Physics-Informed Neural Networks) or Differential Equations.
- Domain Interest: A passion for EVs, and AI. If you want to just build "wrappers", don't apply.

What’s in it for you?

- Monthly stipend up to 15,000/month.
- Work on a real-world MVP that directly impacts the safety of the EV revolution.
- Hands-on experience with multi-modal data and explainable AI (XAI).
- Mentorship in a fast-paced, deep-tech startup environment.
- Certificate included.
eligibility: Anyone skilled in Deep learning can apply. No CGPA asked. No Resume asked. Only Github.
